digest.component_or_area: rebar identity ticket-type and event machinery
propositions: Register a new first-class exempt ticket-type `identity` mirroring session_log/code_review, exempt from lifecycle, gates, graph, and Jira-sync at every enumerated site.
An `identity` ticket must be absent from ready/next_batch/default list and pass check_ac/clarity_check/quality_check.
Add a create path (CLI `rebar identity create`, library `rebar.create_identity`, MCP) minting one CREATE event carrying name, email, provider mappings, and OpenSSH public-key line strings.
Provider mappings use an open lowercase-string vocabulary with opaque external_id (never an email); keys embed key-type in the line with no separate algorithm field.
Implement a self-identity config pointer at `.rebar/current_identity` (JSON `{"identity_id": ...}`) written by `identity use` and `identity create --self`.

`resolve_current_identity()` resolves via pointer file then case-insensitive git config user.email match, returning None for all fallback cases (unset email, subprocess error, zero/multiple matches, dangling pointer) without raising.
